hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q 'manifest.json$'; then dir=$(dirname "$file"); if [ -f "$dir/../package.json" ] || echo "$dir" | grep -q '\.sdPlugin'; then echo 'manifest.json modified — remember to run: streamdeck validate'; fi; fi
